chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5794 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 12.02.2025 Mr. Rehan Qadir, advocate for the petitioner. On the last date, following order was passed: “20-12-2024 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, Advocate for Petitioner. --------------- Available on the record is a letter dated 22.10.2024 issued by NADRA, Regional Office, Karachi (at Court File Pg. 33, Annex F), which states that the Petitioner’s CNIC has been blocked by NADRA, RHO, Peshawar on the basis of Court’s order issued in Case No.26/2010 (at Court File Pg. 25, Annex B) by Civil Judge/Judicial Magistrate-II, Dir Upper. On the next date Counsel shall address this Court as to maintainability of the instant Petition and explain why, as advised by NADRA Karachi, the Petitioner has not approached the concerned Court of Law for issuance of order for unblocking of his CNIC. Relist in the second week of February, 2025.” Learned counsel remains unable to assist as to maintainability even today on the said account. Even otherwise, per order dated 27.02.2023, passed in CP D 6944 of 2022 direct recourse to writ jurisdiction is not warranted. Prima facie, the remedy before the Grievance Commissioner is not exhausted. In view hereof, no case is made out, hence, this petition is dismissed alongwith pending applications. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
